description_long: This lamp features a distinctive pendant design with a wide, circular canopy at the top, likely intended for ceiling mounting. A slender, straight rod or cord descends from the center of the canopy, suspending a sculptural, ruffled lampshade that resembles pleated fabric or paper. The shade is off-white and has a soft, organic form, creating a gentle, diffused light effect. The lamp holder at the center of the shade is a contrasting darker color, possibly brown or bronze, adding a touch of visual interest. The overall aesthetic is modern with a hint of vintage or artisanal craftsmanship, making it suitable for stylish urban interiors or covered outdoor spaces. The lamp's materials and construction suggest a blend of functionality and decorative appeal.
description: A modern pendant lamp with a wide circular canopy, slender suspension rod, and a ruffled off-white fabric or paper shade. The central lamp holder contrasts in a darker tone, giving the lamp a soft, sculptural look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular canopy, straight suspension rod, and the ruffled shade with the lamp holder visible at the center.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, maintaining the clear visibility of the canopy and shade, with subtle changes in the shading and folds of the lampshade.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, highlighting the symmetry of the lamp and the organic folds of the shade, with the lamp holder still centrally visible.
description_view_3: Final rotated view, similar to view 2, emphasizing the even distribution of the ruffled shade and the central lamp holder.
